title: Dow Inc. (DOW) CEO Jim Fitterling Presents at Bernstein's 39th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference (Transcript)
text: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW ) Bernstein's 39th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference May 24, 2023 2:30 PM ET Company Participants Jim Fitterling - Chairman and CEO Conference Call Participants Nan Li - Bernstein Nan Li Good afternoon, everyone. I'm Nan Li, the U.S. Chemicals Analyst at Bernstein.

title: DOW Partners New Energy Blue for Renewable Plastic Materials
text: DOW's deal with New Energy Blue, which is staffed by bio-conversion experts, is the first in North America to generate plastic source materials from corn stover.

title: Can the Dow's 2023 Runaway Winners Keep Running?
text: Following a rather cloudy April, U.S. stock indices have blossomed to fresh 2023 highs in May. With the technology sector the standout performer, the Nasdaq 100 has widened an already big lead over the S&P 500 and Dow Jones 30.

title: 2 Bargain Dow Jones Stocks to Buy Now
text: For investors willing to wait out a period of weak demand, 3M looks like a good deal. A tailwind from AI could help IBM grow profits over the next few years.

title: Dow Jones Today: Index Down on Debt Ceiling Jitters
text: Hopes of a debt ceiling deal were rattled after some Republican lawmakers expressed opposition to the agreement, helping send the Dow Jones Industrial Average lower by 0.15%, or 50 points.

title: Dow Jones Leader Cisco Eyes Buy Point; AI Stock Arista Is Breaking Out Today
text: Cisco Systems is approaching a new buy point, while AI stock Arista Networks is breaking out into buy zone today.

title: 3 Dow Stocks Poised for a Roaring Relief Rally
text: It may seem crazy to talk about stocks having a relief rally. But even if you're the biggest skeptic, you should look at the components of the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

title: 3 Iconic Dow Stocks That Can Safely Double Your Money by 2028
text: The Dow Jones outperformed the other major U.S. stock indexes in 2022. Three industry-leading Dow components check all the appropriate boxes for patient investors.

title: Dow Jones Today: Index Dips Despite AI Wave
text: The value-oriented Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 0.1%, or about 35 points, as investors brushed off debt-ceiling gridlock and piled into tech stocks.

title: 3 Dogs of the Dow for High-Yield Investors
text: The “Dogs of the Dow” strategy consists of investing in the 10 highest-yielding stocks in the Dow Jones Industrial Average. Purchasing the Dogs of the Dow creates higher dividend income by focusing on high-yielding stocks.

title: Chemical maker Dow signs supply agreement for bio-plastic materials
text: U.S. chemical maker Dow Inc said on Thursday it had signed a long-term supply agreement with bio-conversion company New Energy Blue for plastic materials made from corn residue, in a bid to move towards renewable energy sources for production.

title: Dow and New Energy Blue team up on plastic from corn
text: Dow Inc. DOW, -1.23% and privately-held New Energy Blue said Thursday they reached a long-term supply agreement which Dow describes as the first in North America to generate plastic source materials from corn stover, which comes from cornstalks and leaves. Financial terms were not disclosed.

title: Dow and New Energy Blue announce collaboration to develop renewable plastic materials from corn residue
text: First-of-its-kind agreement in North America would create bio-based ethylene for Dow's U.S. Gulf Coast assets to produce renewable plastics across fast-growing end-markets MIDLAND, Mich. , May 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Dow (NYSE: DOW) and New Energy Blue announced a long-term supply agreement in North America in which New Energy Blue will create bio-based ethylene from renewable agricultural residues.

title: Dow Jones Today: Debt Ceiling Delay Drags Down Index
text: Stocks fell for a second straight day as negotiations on the debt ceiling continued, with 3M and Boeing helping lead shares lower.

title: 4 Blue-Chip Stocks From a Struggling Dow for a Stable Portfolio
text: We have narrowed our search to four blue-Chip (components of Dow) stocks with strong potential for 2023. These are: MCD, WMT, CAT and PG.

title: Dow Jones Today: Tech Sends Index Lower
text: Apple, Microsoft, Intel move lower as tech stocks fall, while Chevron moved higher on a ratings upgrade

title: Dow to participate in the Bernstein 39th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
text: MIDLAND, Mich. , May 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jim Fitterling , chairman and chief executive officer of Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW), will participate in a fireside chat during the Bernstein 39th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Wednesday, May 31 at 2:30 p.m.

title: Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq seen flat to lower as US debt ceiling talks enter critical stage
text: US stock indexes are expected to start flat to modestly lower on Monday as talks over the US debt ceiling enter a critical stage and interest rate worries remain. President Joe Biden and House Speaker Kevin McCarthy are set to meet Monday to continue negotiations.

title: Sunny Markets Ahead of Fed Appearances; DE Beats, FL Misses
text: Friday, May 19th, 2023 The markets keep on the sunny side again this morning, with indices looking to complete their best-performing weeks in almost two months. Following the Dow and S&P 500's highest closes since August 2022 and the Nasdaq's best day since May 5th, the Dow is up another +100 points at this hour, the S&P is +15 and the Nasdaq +30.

title: Is It Time to Buy the Dow Jones' 3 Worst-Performing Stocks This Year?

title: 7 High-Quality Dow Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: If you're looking to build a portfolio of high-quality blue chip stocks, Dow stocks should be at or near the top of your list. These stocks, aka the components of the Dow Jones Industrial Average (or DJIA), represent 30 of America's largest, most venerable companies, across multiple sectors.

title: Dow Jones Today: Index Slumps on Retail Sales
text: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 1%, or 336 points, on a day of disappointing earnings and macroeconomic reports. Nike lost the most, while Microsoft led a small pack of gainers.

title: Dow's Seadrift, Texas location selected for X-energy advanced SMR nuclear project to deliver safe, reliable, zero carbon emissions power and steam production
text: Seadrift site's power and steam needs match capabilities of X-energy's Xe-100 small modular reactor Dow and X-energy to prepare and submit Construction Permit applications to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission Project expected to be complete by the end of the decade MIDLAND, Mich. and ROCKVILLE, Md.

title: Dow Jones Leader Visa, 3 Other Top Stocks Flash Buy Signals
text: Dow Jones leader Visa, along with payment giant Mastercard and Dynatrace, are in fresh buy zones in today's stock market action. The post Dow Jones Leader Visa, 3 Other Top Stocks Flash Buy Signals appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Walgreens stock falls to lead the Dow's losers, after rival CVS cut its full-year profit outlook
text: Shares of Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc. WBA slumped 3.4% toward a six-week low, on the heels of CVS Health Corp.'s CVS earnings report in which the fellow health care services and drugstore chain cut its full-year profit outlook. Walgreens' stock, which paced the Dow Jones Industrial Average's DJIA declines, has dropped 8.2% amid a three-day losing streak.

title: Dow advances to #7 on DiversityInc's 2023 Top 50 Companies for Diversity list
text: Dow makes the list for a 6th consecutive year MIDLAND, Mich. , May 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dow (NYSE: DOW) advanced to 7th place on the 2023 DiversityInc Top 50 Companies for Diversity list, which was announced yesterday at DiversityInc's celebratory event in New York City.

title: Dow seen inching higher ahead of Fed rate verdict
text: 7:50am: Modest gains ahead of rate decision Wall Street is expected to open modestly higher as investors look to the US Federal Reserve's rate decision later today amid predictions that rate setters will deliver a 25-basis point interest rate hike as they look to rein in inflationary pressures. Beyond monetary policy, investors are also looking to the upcoming non-farm payrolls numbers on Friday before taking on new positions.

title: DOW Selects Linde for Ethylene Cracker and Derivatives Site
text: The ethylene cracker and derivatives complex will decarbonize roughly 20% of Dow's (DOW) global ethylene capacity while increasing its global polyethylene supply by around 15%.
